sanskrit:
दुःख में सुमिरन सब करें, सुख में करें न कोय।
जो सुख में सुमिरन करें, दुःख काहे को होय॥
english: Everyone remembers God in sorrow; none do in happiness. If one were to remember God in happiness, why would sorrow come at all?

sanskrit:
बुरा जो देखन मैं चला, बुरा न मिलिया कोय।
जो दिल खोजा आपना, मुझसे बुरा न कोय॥
english: I went looking for the bad in others, but found none. When I searched my own heart, I found none worse than myself.
